content.text:
I now have a complete picture of all per-step metrics across the entire `rllm_train` codebase. Here is the comprehensive report.

---

## Complete Per-Step Metrics in rllm_train

The codebase has three training pipelines (TRL-based `train.py`, custom `simple_grpo.py`, custom `minimal_train.py`) plus shared infrastructure (`logger.py`, `perf_stats.py`, `rollout.py`, `hf_engine.py`, `trajectory_writer.py`). I catalog every per-step field below, grouped by source.

---

### 1. TrainingLogger / StepRecord (`/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/rllm_train/logger.py`)

The `StepRecord` dataclass (lines 10-21) stores these fields per step:

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `step` | `int` | Step number (1-based counter from rollout) |
| `num_trajectories` | `int` | Number of trajectories generated in this step |
| `avg_reward` | `float` | Mean reward across all trajectories in this step |
| `rollout_time` | `float` | Wall-clock time (seconds) for the full rollout phase |
| `tokens_per_second` | `float` | LLM throughput during rollout (model_tokens / llm_time) |
| `loss` | `float` | Training loss (populated from TRL metrics; field exists but never explicitly set in rollout flow) |
| `entropy` | `float` | Policy entropy (from TRL metrics; same -- declared in dataclass but populated only via `update_training_metrics`) |
| `grad_norm` | `float` | Gradient norm (from TRL metrics; same pattern) |
| `lr` | `float` | Learning rate (declared but not populated in current code) |
| `reward_from_fn` | `float` | Reward from reward function (declared but not populated in current code) |

The logger also stores `_trl_metrics` (list[dict]), accumulated via `update_training_metrics()` (line 151-152). The post-training report (`_print_training_dynamics`, lines 234-252) extracts these keys from those dicts:

| TRL Metric Key | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `loss` | `float` | GRPO policy gradient loss |
| `entropy` | `float` | Policy entropy (from TRL's GRPOTrainer) |
| `grad_norm` | `float` | Gradient norm after clipping |

**Note:** These TRL keys come from TRL's `GRPOTrainer` internal logging. The logger comment at line 140 says "Called from RllmCallback.on_log" but no `RllmCallback` class is defined in this codebase. The `update_training_metrics()` method exists but is never called in `train.py` -- it appears to be a hook intended for a callback that hasn't been wired in yet.

---

### 2. RolloutStats / PerfTracker (`/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/rllm_train/perf_stats.py`)

The `RolloutStats` dataclass (lines 12-56) captures per-step performance data:

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `step` | `int` | Step number |
| `num_trajectories` | `int` | Count of trajectories in this rollout |
| `total_prompt_tokens` | `int` | Sum of prompt token lengths across all trajectories |
| `total_response_tokens` | `int` | Sum of response token lengths across all trajectories |
| `total_model_tokens` | `int` | Tokens where mask==1 (model-generated / assistant tokens) |
| `total_env_tokens` | `int` | Tokens where mask==0 (environment / tool-response tokens) |
| `rollout_time` | `float` | Total rollout wall-clock time (seconds) |
| `llm_time` | `float` | LLM inference time (max across parallel trajectories) |
| `env_time` | `float` | Environment execution time (max across parallel trajectories) |
| `logprob_time` | `float` | Log-probability computation time (seconds) |
| `rewards` | `list[float]` | Per-trajectory reward list |

Computed properties (not stored, but available per step):

| Property | Type | Computation |
|---|---|---|
| `avg_reward` | `float` | `sum(rewards) / len(rewards)` |
| `tokens_per_second` | `float` | `total_model_tokens / llm_time` |
| `avg_response_len` | `float` | `total_response_tokens / num_trajectories` |

Serialized via `to_dict()` (lines 40-56) which adds all of the above plus the computed properties.

`PerfTracker` also records:
- `step_times` (list[float]) -- per full step time, recorded via `record_step_time()`

---

### 3. Rollout Function Return Value (`/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/rllm_train/rollout.py`)

The `rollout_func` returned by `make_rllm_rollout_func` (lines 40-147) returns a dict to the GRPO trainer:

| Key | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `prompt_ids` | `list[list[int]]` | Token IDs for each prompt |
| `completion_ids` | `list[list[int]]` | Token IDs for each completion |
| `logprobs` | `list[list[float]]` | Per-token log-probabilities for completions |
| `env_mask` | `list[list[int]]` | Binary mask (1=model token, 0=env token) for each completion |

---

### 4. HFAgentExecutionEngine Per-Trajectory Result (`/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/rllm_train/hf_engine.py`)

Each trajectory result from `run_agent_trajectory_async` (lines 261-275) returns in Token mode:

| Key | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `prompt_tokens` | `torch.Tensor (long)` | Prompt token IDs |
| `response_tokens` | `torch.Tensor (long)` | Response token IDs |
| `response_masks` | `torch.Tensor (long)` | Binary mask (1=assistant, 0=env/tool) |
| `trajectory_reward` | `float` | Total trajectory reward (sum of step rewards) |
| `idx` | `int` | Environment index |
| `metrics.steps` | `int` | Number of agent steps taken |
| `metrics.reward_time` | `float` or `None` | Time to compute final reward |
| `metrics.env_time` | `float` | Cumulative environment step time |
| `metrics.llm_time` | `float` | Cumulative LLM inference time |
| `metrics.total_time` | `float` | Total trajectory wall-clock time |

---

### 5. TrajectoryWriter Per-Trajectory Record (`/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/rllm_train/trajectory_writer.py`)

Written to `step_NNNN.jsonl`, one line per trajectory (lines 39-73):

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `trajectory_id` | `int` | Global trajectory counter |
| `step` | `int` | Training step number |
| `index` | `int` | Trajectory index within this step |
| `question` | `str` | The problem question |
| `expected_answer` | `str` | Ground truth answer |
| `chat_completions` | `list[dict]` | Full conversation messages |
| `reward` | `float` | Trajectory reward |
| `num_steps` | `int` | Number of agent steps |
| `prompt_tokens` | `int` | Prompt token count |
| `response_tokens` | `int` | Response token count |
| `response_masks_sum` | `int` | Sum of response masks (model-generated token count) |
| `timing.llm_time` | `float` | LLM time for this trajectory |
| `timing.env_time` | `float` | Env time for this trajectory |
| `timing.total_time` | `float` | Total time for this trajectory |
| `timing.reward_time` | `float` or `None` | Final reward computation time |
| `response_text` | `str` | Decoded response text (if tokenizer provided) |

---

### 6. simple_grpo.py Per-Step Logging (`/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/rllm_train/simple_grpo.py`)

This standalone GRPO loop logs per step (line 221-226):

| Metric | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `global_step` | `int` | Step counter |
| `avg_reward` | `float` | Mean reward across batch |
| `loss_accum` | `float` | Accumulated policy gradient loss |
| `step_time` | `float` | Time for this step (seconds) |
| `elapsed` | `float` | Total elapsed time (seconds) |
| `eta` | `float` | Estimated remaining time (seconds) |

End-of-training summary saved to `analysis.json` (lines 252-261):

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `total_steps` | `int` | Final step count |
| `final_reward` | `float` | Last step reward |
| `avg_reward_last5` | `float` | Average of last 5 step rewards |
| `reward_history` | `list[float]` | Full per-step reward list |
| `total_time` | `float` | Total training time |
| `completed` | `bool` | Always True |

---

### 7. minimal_train.py Per-Step Logging (`/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/rllm_train/minimal_train.py`)

This standalone loop logs per step (line 177-179):

| Metric | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `step` | `int` | Step counter |
| `reward` | `float` | Mean reward (averaged over all generations in gradient accumulation window) |
| `loss` | `float` | KL-regularized policy gradient loss value |
| `time` | `float` | Elapsed time since start |

End-of-training report saved to `training_report.json` (lines 193-203):

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `total_steps` | `int` | Final step count |
| `avg_reward` | `float` | Average reward across all steps |
| `rewards_history` | `list[float]` | Per-step reward list |
| `total_time` | `float` | Total wall time |
| `config` | `dict` | Full training config |

---

### 8. TRL GRPOTrainer (External, Used by train.py)

When using `train.py` with TRL's `GRPOTrainer`, the trainer itself logs internal metrics every `logging_steps` steps. Based on what `logger.py`'s `_print_training_dynamics` expects to extract from TRL logs, the standard GRPOTrainer per-step metrics include:

| Key | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `loss` | `float` | GRPO policy loss |
| `grad_norm` | `float` | Gradient norm |
| `entropy` | `float` | Policy entropy |
| `learning_rate` | `float` | Current learning rate |

**Important caveat:** In the current `train.py` (line 242), `trainer.train()` is called but there is no callback wired to forward TRL's internal `on_log` events into `TrainingLogger.update_training_metrics()`. The logger has the infrastructure to receive these (the `_trl_metrics` list, the `update_training_metrics` method, and the `_print_training_dynamics` report method), but the connection is incomplete. The comment at line 140 of `logger.py` references "RllmCallback.on_log" but no such callback class exists in the codebase.

---

### Summary of All Distinct Per-Step Metric Names Across the Codebase

| Metric Name | Where Produced | Type |
|---|---|---|
| `step` | All pipelines | `int` |
| `num_trajectories` | StepRecord, RolloutStats | `int` |
| `avg_reward` | StepRecord, RolloutStats (computed), simple_grpo, minimal_train | `float` |
| `rewards` (per-trajectory list) | RolloutStats | `list[float]` |
| `rollout_time` | StepRecord, RolloutStats | `float` |
| `tokens_per_second` | StepRecord, RolloutStats (computed) | `float` |
| `loss` | StepRecord, simple_grpo (`loss_accum`), minimal_train | `float` |
| `entropy` | StepRecord (via TRL) | `float` |
| `grad_norm` | StepRecord (via TRL) | `float` |
| `lr` | StepRecord (declared, not populated) | `float` |
| `reward_from_fn` | StepRecord (declared, not populated) | `float` |
| `total_prompt_tokens` | RolloutStats | `int` |
| `total_response_tokens` | RolloutStats | `int` |
| `total_model_tokens` | RolloutStats | `int` |
| `total_env_tokens` | RolloutStats | `int` |
| `llm_time` | RolloutStats | `float` |
| `env_time` | RolloutStats | `float` |
| `logprob_time` | RolloutStats | `float` |
| `avg_response_len` | RolloutStats (computed) | `float` |
| `trajectory_reward` | hf_engine per-trajectory result | `float` |
| `prompt_ids` / `completion_ids` / `logprobs` / `env_mask` | rollout_func return to GRPOTrainer | `list[list[...]]` |
| `prompt_tokens` / `response_tokens` / `response_masks` | hf_engine per-trajectory result | `torch.Tensor` |
| `metrics.steps` | hf_engine per-trajectory | `int` |
| `metrics.llm_time` / `env_time` / `total_time` / `reward_time` | hf_engine per-trajectory | `float` |
| `trajectory_id` / `question` / `expected_answer` / `chat_completions` / `num_steps` / `response_text` | TrajectoryWriter JSONL records | mixed |
| `step_time` / `elapsed` / `eta` | simple_grpo | `float` |
| `reward_history` / `rewards_history` | simple_grpo analysis.json, minimal_train training_report.json | `list[float]` |

---

### Key Files

- `/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/rllm_train/logger.py` -- StepRecord dataclass, TrainingLogger, TRL metrics collection
- `/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/rllm_train/perf_stats.py` -- RolloutStats dataclass, PerfTracker with timing and token metrics
- `/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/rllm_train/rollout.py` -- rollout_func returning prompt_ids/completion_ids/logprobs/env_mask
- `/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/rllm_train/hf_engine.py` -- per-trajectory results including reward, timing, step counts
- `/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/rllm_train/train.py` -- TRL-based training using GRPOTrainer
- `/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/rllm_train/simple_grpo.py` -- standalone GRPO with per-step reward/loss/time
- `/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/rllm_train/minimal_train.py` -- standalone GRPO with KL penalty, per-step reward/loss/time
- `/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/rllm_train/trajectory_writer.py` -- JSONL trajectory persistence with all per-trajectory metrics

file.content:
"""
Training logger with real-time progress table and post-training report.
"""

import os
import time
from dataclasses import dataclass, field


@dataclass
class StepRecord:
    step: int = 0
    num_trajectories: int = 0
    avg_reward: float = 0.0
    rollout_time: float = 0.0
    tokens_per_second: float = 0.0
    loss: float = 0.0
    entropy: float = 0.0
    grad_norm: float = 0.0
    lr: float = 0.0
    reward_from_fn: float = 0.0


class TrainingLogger:
    def __init__(self, verbose=True, log_file=None):
        self.verbose = verbose
        self.total_steps: int = 0
        self.num_epochs: int = 0
        self.total_trajectories: int = 0
        self.start_time: float = 0.0
        self._rollout_start: float = 0.0
        self._header_printed = False

        self.step_records: list[StepRecord] = []
        self._current: StepRecord | None = None
        self._trl_metrics: list[dict] = []

        self._log_file = None
        if log_file:
            os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(log_file), exist_ok=True)
            self._log_file = open(log_file, "w")

    def _print(self, text=""):
        print(text)
        if self._log_file:
            self._log_file.write(text + "\n")
            self._log_file.flush()

    def close(self):
        if self._log_file:
            self._log_file.close()
            self._log_file = None

    def _fmt_time(self, seconds):
        if seconds < 60:
            return f"{seconds:.1f}s"
        m, s = divmod(int(seconds), 60)
        if m < 60:
            return f"{m}m{s:02d}s"
        h, m = divmod(m, 60)
        return f"{h}h{m:02d}m{s:02d}s"

    # ── Setup phase ──────────────────────────────────────────

    def log_training_start(self, config):
        self.start_time = time.time()
        self._print(config.summary())
        self._print()

    def log_model_loaded(self, model_name, device, param_count=None):
        param_str = f", {param_count/1e6:.1f}M params" if param_count else ""
        self._print(f"  Model loaded: {model_name} ({device}{param_str})")

    def log_dataset_ready(self, size, sample=None):
        self._print(f"  Dataset ready: {size} problems")

    def log_trainer_ready(self, num_epochs):
        self.num_epochs = num_epochs
        self._print(f"  Trainer ready: {num_epochs} epoch(s)")
        self._print()

    # ── Progress table ───────────────────────────────────────

    def _print_header(self):
        if self._header_printed:
            return
        self._header_printed = True
        header = (
            f"{'Step':>6}  {'Trajs':>5}  {'Reward':>7}  "
            f"{'Rollout':>8}  {'tok/s':>7}  {'ETA':>8}"
        )
        self._print(header)
        self._print("─" * len(header))

    def _print_step_row(self, rec: StepRecord):
        elapsed = time.time() - self.start_time
        remaining_steps = self.total_steps - rec.step if self.total_steps > 0 else 0
        avg_step = elapsed / rec.step if rec.step else 0
        eta = self._fmt_time(remaining_steps * avg_step) if avg_step and remaining_steps > 0 else "—"

        tps_str = f"{rec.tokens_per_second:.1f}" if rec.tokens_per_second > 0 else "—"

        total_str = str(self.total_steps) if self.total_steps > 0 else "?"
        row = (
            f"{rec.step:>3}/{total_str:<3} "
            f"{rec.num_trajectories:>5}  "
            f"{rec.avg_reward:>7.3f}  "
            f"{self._fmt_time(rec.rollout_time):>8}  "
            f"{tps_str:>7}  "
            f"{eta:>8}"
        )
        self._print(row)

    # ── Called from rollout.py ────────────────────────────────

    def log_rollout_start(self, step, num_prompts, num_generations):
        self._rollout_start = time.time()
        self._current = StepRecord(step=step)
        self._print_header()
        total_str = str(self.total_steps) if self.total_steps > 0 else "?"
        self._print(f"    ··· step {step}/{total_str}: generating {num_generations} trajectories...")

    def log_rollout_done(self, step, num_trajectories, rewards=None, rollout_stats=None):
        elapsed = time.time() - self._rollout_start
        self.total_trajectories += num_trajectories

        rec = self._current or StepRecord(step=step)
        rec.num_trajectories = num_trajectories
        rec.rollout_time = elapsed
        if rewards:
            rec.avg_reward = sum(rewards) / len(rewards)
        if rollout_stats:
            rec.tokens_per_second = rollout_stats.tokens_per_second

        self._print_header()
        self._print_step_row(rec)
        self.step_records.append(rec)
        self._current = None

    # ── Called from RllmCallback.on_log ──────────────────────

    def log_trajectory_done(self, step, idx, total, reward):
        self._print(f"    ··· trajectory {idx}/{total} done (reward={reward:.3f})")

    def log_logprob_start(self, step):
        self._print(f"    ··· computing logprobs...")

    def log_training_update_start(self, step):
        self._print(f"    ··· training update...")

    def update_training_metrics(self, logs: dict):
        self._trl_metrics.append(logs)

    def set_perf_stats(self, rollout_stats):
        if not self.step_records or not rollout_stats:
            return
        for rec, rs in zip(self.step_records, rollout_stats):
            rec.tokens_per_second = rs.tokens_per_second

    # ── End of training ──────────────────────────────────────

    def log_training_done(self):
        pass

    def log_model_saved(self, path):
        self._print(f"  Model saved to {path}")

    # ── Training Report ──────────────────────────────────────

    def print_training_report(self, config, perf_summary, output_dir):
        elapsed = time.time() - self.start_time
        records = self.step_records
        trl = self._trl_metrics

        self._print()
        self._print("=" * 60)
        self._print("                    Training Report")
        self._print("=" * 60)

        self._print()
        self._print("  Training Overview")
        self._print(f"    Model:          {config.model_name}")
        self._print(f"    Dataset:        {config.num_problems} problems, {config.num_epochs} epoch(s)")
        self._print(f"    Total:          {len(records)} steps, {self.total_trajectories} trajectories, {self._fmt_time(elapsed)}")

        self._print()
        self._print("  Reward Trend")
        if records:
            self._print_reward_trend(records)

        self._print()
        self._print("  Training Dynamics")
        if trl:
            self._print_training_dynamics(trl)

        self._print()
        self._print("  Performance Breakdown")
        if perf_summary:
            self._print_perf_breakdown(perf_summary)

        self._print()
        self._print("  Output Files")
        traj_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, "trajectories")
        n_traj_files = len([f for f in os.listdir(traj_dir) if f.endswith(".jsonl")]) if os.path.isdir(traj_dir) else 0
        self._print(f"    Trajectories:   {traj_dir}/ ({n_traj_files} files, {self.total_trajectories} trajectories)")
        self._print(f"    Perf stats:     {os.path.join(output_dir, 'perf_stats.json')}")
        if config.save_model:
            self._print(f"    Model:          {os.path.join(output_dir, 'final_model/')}")
        self._print("=" * 60)

    def _print_reward_trend(self, records):
        rewards = [r.avg_reward for r in records]
        n = len(rewards)
        if n <= 2:
            self._print(f"    avg: {sum(rewards)/n:.3f} (min={min(rewards):.3f}, max={max(rewards):.3f})")
            return

        first_half = rewards[:n // 2]
        second_half = rewards[n // 2:]
        avg_first = sum(first_half) / len(first_half)
        avg_second = sum(second_half) / len(second_half)

        if abs(avg_second - avg_first) < 0.001:
            self._print(f"    Stable at {avg_second:.3f} across all steps")
        else:
            delta = avg_second - avg_first
            direction = "+" if delta > 0 else ""
            pct = (delta / avg_first * 100) if avg_first else 0
            self._print(f"    Step 1-{n//2}:     avg {avg_first:.3f}")
            self._print(f"    Step {n//2+1}-{n}:     avg {avg_second:.3f} ({direction}{pct:.1f}%)")

        self._print(f"    Final:          {rewards[-1]:.3f} (min={min(rewards):.3f}, max={max(rewards):.3f})")

    def _print_training_dynamics(self, trl_logs):
        losses = [float(l.get("loss", 0)) for l in trl_logs if "loss" in l]
        entropies = [float(l.get("entropy", 0)) for l in trl_logs if "entropy" in l]
        grad_norms = [float(l.get("grad_norm", 0)) for l in trl_logs if "grad_norm" in l]

        if losses:
            first, last = losses[0], losses[-1]
            if first > 0:
                change = (last - first) / first * 100
                self._print(f"    Loss:           {first:.4f} -> {last:.4f} ({change:+.1f}%)")
            else:
                self._print(f"    Loss:           {first:.4f} -> {last:.4f}")

        if entropies:
            self._print(f"    Entropy:        {entropies[0]:.4f} -> {entropies[-1]:.4f}")

        if grad_norms:
            avg_gn = sum(grad_norms) / len(grad_norms)
            self._print(f"    Grad norm:      avg {avg_gn:.4f} (min={min(grad_norms):.4f}, max={max(grad_norms):.4f})")

    def _print_perf_breakdown(self, s):
        tb = s["time_breakdown"]
        ts = s["token_stats"]
        wall = s["total_wall_time"]
        bar_width = 30

        items = [
            ("Rollout", tb["rollout_pct"]),
            ("  LLM", tb["llm_pct"]),
            ("  Env", tb["env_pct"]),
            ("  Logprob", tb["logprob_pct"]),
            ("Training", tb["training_pct"]),
        ]

        self._print(f"    Wall time:      {self._fmt_time(wall)}")
        for label, pct in items:
            filled = int(bar_width * pct / 100)
            bar = "\u2588" * filled + "\u2591" * (bar_width - filled)
            self._print(f"    {label:<12} {bar} {pct:>5.1f}%")

        self._print(f"    Throughput:     {ts['avg_tokens_per_second']} tok/s, avg {ts['avg_response_length']} tokens/response")

"""
Agent RL Demo: rllm + TRL integration on Mac Air

Usage:
    # Natural language:
    python -m rllm_train.train "用 qwen-0.5b 训练数学 agent，64 个问题，2 个 epoch"
    python -m rllm_train.train "quick test with 16 problems"

    # Default config:
    python -m rllm_train.train
"""

import os
import re
import sys
import warnings

os.environ["TRL_EXPERIMENTAL_SILENCE"] = "1"
os.environ["TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM"] = "false"
os.environ["HF_HUB_DISABLE_PROGRESS_BARS"] = "1"
os.environ["HF_HUB_DISABLE_IMPLICIT_TOKEN"] = "1"
os.environ["TRANSFORMERS_NO_ADVISORY_WARNINGS"] = "1"

warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message=".*pin_memory.*")
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message=".*torch_dtype.*is deprecated.*")
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message=".*attention mask is not set.*")
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message=".*unauthenticated requests.*")

import logging
logging.getLogger("huggingface_hub").setLevel(logging.ERROR)

import torch
from datasets import Dataset
import transformers
transformers.logging.set_verbosity_error()
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer, PrinterCallback
from peft import LoraConfig, TaskType
from trl.trainer.grpo_config import GRPOConfig
from trl.trainer.grpo_trainer import GRPOTrainer

from rllm_train.config import TrainingConfig, parse_natural_language
from rllm_train.logger import TrainingLogger
from rllm_train.math_env import generate_math_problems


def build_dataset(problems):
    records = []
    for p in problems:
        records.append({
            "prompt": [
                {"role": "system", "content": "Solve the math problem. Show your reasoning, then write the final numeric answer."},
                {"role": "user", "content": p["question"]},
            ],
            "answer": p["answer"],
        })
    return Dataset.from_list(records)


def load_deepscaler_dataset(config):
    from datasets import load_from_disk
    ds = load_from_disk(config.dataset_path)
    if config.num_problems < len(ds):
        ds = ds.shuffle(seed=config.seed).select(range(config.num_problems))
    records = []
    for item in ds:
        records.append({
            "prompt": [
                {"role": "system", "content": "Solve the math problem. Show your reasoning, then write the final numeric answer."},
                {"role": "user", "content": item["problem"]},
            ],
            "answer": item["answer"],
        })
    return Dataset.from_list(records)


def math_reward_fn(prompts, completions, **kwargs):
    rewards = []
    answers = kwargs.get("answer", [])
    for i, (prompt, completion) in enumerate(zip(prompts, completions)):
        gt = answers[i] if i < len(answers) else None
        if isinstance(completion, list):
            text = " ".join(
                msg.get("content", "") for msg in completion if isinstance(msg, dict)
            )
        else:
            text = str(completion)
        numbers = re.findall(r'-?\d+\.?\d*', text)
        if numbers and gt is not None:
            try:
                predicted = float(numbers[-1])
                expected = float(gt)
                rewards.append(1.0 if abs(predicted - expected) < 1e-6 else 0.0)
            except (ValueError, TypeError):
                rewards.append(0.0)
        else:
            rewards.append(0.0)
    return rewards


def eval_answer_to_float(answer_str):
    import math as _math
    answer_str = answer_str.strip()
    try:
        return float(answer_str)
    except ValueError:
        pass
    try:
        import sympy
        s = answer_str
        s = s.replace('\\frac{', '((').replace('}{', ')/(').replace('}', ')')
        s = s.replace('\\sqrt{', '_math.sqrt(')
        s = s.replace('\\pi', str(_math.pi))
        s = s.replace('^', '**')
        if s.count('(') > s.count(')'):
            s += ')' * (s.count('(') - s.count(')'))
        val = float(eval(s, {"__builtins__": {}}, {"_math": _math, "math": _math}))
        return val
    except Exception:
        pass
    try:
        import sympy
        expr = sympy.sympify(answer_str, evaluate=True)
        return float(expr.evalf())
    except Exception:
        return None


def deepscaler_reward_fn(prompts, completions, **kwargs):
    rewards = []
    answers = kwargs.get("answer", [])
    for i, (prompt, completion) in enumerate(zip(prompts, completions)):
        gt = answers[i] if i < len(answers) else None
        if isinstance(completion, list):
            text = " ".join(
                msg.get("content", "") for msg in completion if isinstance(msg, dict)
            )
        else:
            text = str(completion)
        numbers = re.findall(r'-?\d+\.?\d*', text)
        if not numbers or gt is None:
            rewards.append(0.0)
            continue
        predicted = float(numbers[-1])
        gt_val = eval_answer_to_float(str(gt))
        if gt_val is None:
            rewards.append(0.0)
        elif abs(predicted - gt_val) < max(1e-3, 1e-2 * abs(gt_val)):
            rewards.append(1.0)
        else:
            rel_err = abs(predicted - gt_val) / max(abs(gt_val), 1e-6)
            if rel_err < 0.1:
                rewards.append(0.5)
            elif rel_err < 0.5:
                rewards.append(0.2)
            else:
                rewards.append(0.0)
    return rewards


def main(config: TrainingConfig | None = None):
    if config is None:
        config = TrainingConfig()

    output_dir = config.output_dir
    os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)

    config.to_json(os.path.join(output_dir, "config.json"))

    log_file = os.path.join(output_dir, "training_log.txt")
    log = TrainingLogger(verbose=config.verbose, log_file=log_file)
    log.log_training_start(config)

    tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(config.model_name, trust_remote_code=True)
    if tokenizer.pad_token is None:
        tokenizer.pad_token = tokenizer.eos_token

    if torch.cuda.is_available():
        device = "cuda"
        dtype = torch.bfloat16
    elif torch.backends.mps.is_available():
        device = "mps"
        dtype = torch.float32
    else:
        device = "cpu"
        dtype = torch.float32

    model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(
        config.model_name, torch_dtype=dtype, trust_remote_code=True,
    )
    model.enable_input_require_grads()
    param_count = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())
    log.log_model_loaded(config.model_name, device, param_count)

    if config.dataset == "deepscaler" and config.dataset_path:
        dataset = load_deepscaler_dataset(config)
        reward_fn = deepscaler_reward_fn
    else:
        problems = generate_math_problems(n=config.num_problems, seed=config.seed, difficulty=config.difficulty)
        dataset = build_dataset(problems)
        reward_fn = math_reward_fn
    log.log_dataset_ready(len(dataset), dataset[0])

    training_args = GRPOConfig(
        output_dir=output_dir,
        num_train_epochs=config.num_epochs,
        per_device_train_batch_size=config.batch_size,
        num_generations=config.num_generations,
        max_completion_length=config.max_completion_length,
        learning_rate=config.learning_rate,
        logging_steps=config.logging_steps,
        logging_strategy="steps",
        log_level="info",
        save_strategy="no",
        bf16=(dtype == torch.bfloat16),
        fp16=False,
        gradient_accumulation_steps=config.gradient_accumulation_steps,
        gradient_checkpointing=getattr(config, 'gradient_checkpointing', False),
        report_to="none",
        remove_unused_columns=False,
        disable_tqdm=True,
        temperature=config.temperature,
        dataloader_num_workers=0,
    )

    log.log_trainer_ready(config.num_epochs)

    trainer = GRPOTrainer(
        model=model,
        args=training_args,
        processing_class=tokenizer,
        train_dataset=dataset,
        reward_funcs=[reward_fn],
        peft_config=LoraConfig(
            task_type=TaskType.CAUSAL_LM,
            r=16,
            lora_alpha=32,
            lora_dropout=0.05,
            target_modules=["q_proj", "k_proj", "v_proj", "o_proj", "gate_proj", "up_proj", "down_proj"],
        ),
    )

    trainer.train()

    log.print_training_report(config, None, output_dir)

    if config.save_model:
        save_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "final_model")
        model.save_pretrained(save_path)
        tokenizer.save_pretrained(save_path)
        log.log_model_saved(save_path)

    log.close()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    if len(sys.argv) > 1:
        arg = " ".join(sys.argv[1:])
        if arg.endswith(".json") and os.path.isfile(arg):
            cfg = TrainingConfig.from_json(arg)
        else:
            cfg = parse_natural_language(arg)
    else:
        cfg = TrainingConfig()
    main(cfg)

"""
Training logger with real-time progress table and post-training report.
"""

import os
import time
from dataclasses import dataclass, field


@dataclass
class StepRecord:
    step: int = 0
    num_trajectories: int = 0
    avg_reward: float = 0.0
    rollout_time: float = 0.0
    tokens_per_second: float = 0.0
    loss: float = 0.0
    entropy: float = 0.0
    grad_norm: float = 0.0
    lr: float = 0.0
    reward_from_fn: float = 0.0


class TrainingLogger:
    def __init__(self, verbose=True, log_file=None):
        self.verbose = verbose
        self.total_steps: int = 0
        self.num_epochs: int = 0
        self.total_trajectories: int = 0
        self.start_time: float = 0.0
        self._rollout_start: float = 0.0
        self._header_printed = False

        self.step_records: list[StepRecord] = []
        self._current: StepRecord | None = None
        self._trl_metrics: list[dict] = []

        self._log_file = None
        if log_file:
            os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(log_file), exist_ok=True)
            self._log_file = open(log_file, "w")

    def _print(self, text=""):
        print(text)
        if self._log_file:
            self._log_file.write(text + "\n")
            self._log_file.flush()

    def close(self):
        if self._log_file:
            self._log_file.close()
            self._log_file = None

    def _fmt_time(self, seconds):
        if seconds < 60:
            return f"{seconds:.1f}s"
        m, s = divmod(int(seconds), 60)
        if m < 60:
            return f"{m}m{s:02d}s"
        h, m = divmod(m, 60)
        return f"{h}h{m:02d}m{s:02d}s"

    # ── Setup phase ──────────────────────────────────────────

    def log_training_start(self, config):
        self.start_time = time.time()
        self._print(config.summary())
        self._print()

    def log_model_loaded(self, model_name, device, param_count=None):
        param_str = f", {param_count/1e6:.1f}M params" if param_count else ""
        self._print(f"  Model loaded: {model_name} ({device}{param_str})")

    def log_dataset_ready(self, size, sample=None):
        self._print(f"  Dataset ready: {size} problems")

    def log_trainer_ready(self, num_epochs):
        self.num_epochs = num_epochs
        self._print(f"  Trainer ready: {num_epochs} epoch(s)")
        self._print()

    # ── Progress table ───────────────────────────────────────

    def _print_header(self):
        if self._header_printed:
            return
        self._header_printed = True
        header = (
            f"{'Step':>6}  {'Trajs':>5}  {'Reward':>7}  "
            f"{'Rollout':>8}  {'tok/s':>7}  {'ETA':>8}"
        )
        self._print(header)
        self._print("─" * len(header))

    def _print_step_row(self, rec: StepRecord):
        elapsed = time.time() - self.start_time
        remaining_steps = self.total_steps - rec.step if self.total_steps > 0 else 0
        avg_step = elapsed / rec.step if rec.step else 0
        eta = self._fmt_time(remaining_steps * avg_step) if avg_step and remaining_steps > 0 else "—"

        tps_str = f"{rec.tokens_per_second:.1f}" if rec.tokens_per_second > 0 else "—"

        total_str = str(self.total_steps) if self.total_steps > 0 else "?"
        row = (
            f"{rec.step:>3}/{total_str:<3} "
            f"{rec.num_trajectories:>5}  "
            f"{rec.avg_reward:>7.3f}  "
            f"{self._fmt_time(rec.rollout_time):>8}  "
            f"{tps_str:>7}  "
            f"{eta:>8}"
        )
        self._print(row)

    # ── Called from rollout.py ────────────────────────────────

    def log_rollout_start(self, step, num_prompts, num_generations):
        self._rollout_start = time.time()
        self._current = StepRecord(step=step)
        self._print_header()
        total_str = str(self.total_steps) if self.total_steps > 0 else "?"
        self._print(f"    ··· step {step}/{total_str}: generating {num_generations} trajectories...")

    def log_rollout_done(self, step, num_trajectories, rewards=None, rollout_stats=None):
        elapsed = time.time() - self._rollout_start
        self.total_trajectories += num_trajectories

        rec = self._current or StepRecord(step=step)
        rec.num_trajectories = num_trajectories
        rec.rollout_time = elapsed
        if rewards:
            rec.avg_reward = sum(rewards) / len(rewards)
        if rollout_stats:
            rec.tokens_per_second = rollout_stats.tokens_per_second

        self._print_header()
        self._print_step_row(rec)
        self.step_records.append(rec)
        self._current = None

    # ── Called from RllmCallback.on_log ──────────────────────

    def log_trajectory_done(self, step, idx, total, reward):
        self._print(f"    ··· trajectory {idx}/{total} done (reward={reward:.3f})")

    def log_logprob_start(self, step):
        self._print(f"    ··· computing logprobs...")

    def log_training_update_start(self, step):
        self._print(f"    ··· training update...")

    def update_training_metrics(self, logs: dict):
        self._trl_metrics.append(logs)

    def set_perf_stats(self, rollout_stats):
        if not self.step_records or not rollout_stats:
            return
        for rec, rs in zip(self.step_records, rollout_stats):
            rec.tokens_per_second = rs.tokens_per_second

    # ── End of training ──────────────────────────────────────

    def log_training_done(self):
        pass

    def log_model_saved(self, path):
        self._print(f"  Model saved to {path}")

    # ── Training Report ──────────────────────────────────────

    def print_training_report(self, config, perf_summary, output_dir):
        elapsed = time.time() - self.start_time
        records = self.step_records
        trl = self._trl_metrics

        self._print()
        self._print("=" * 60)
        self._print("                    Training Report")
        self._print("=" * 60)

        self._print()
        self._print("  Training Overview")
        self._print(f"    Model:          {config.model_name}")
        self._print(f"    Dataset:        {config.num_problems} problems, {config.num_epochs} epoch(s)")
        self._print(f"    Total:          {len(records)} steps, {self.total_trajectories} trajectories, {self._fmt_time(elapsed)}")

        self._print()
        self._print("  Reward Trend")
        if records:
            self._print_reward_trend(records)

        self._print()
        self._print("  Training Dynamics")
        if trl:
            self._print_training_dynamics(trl)

        self._print()
        self._print("  Performance Breakdown")
        if perf_summary:
            self._print_perf_breakdown(perf_summary)

        self._print()
        self._print("  Output Files")
        traj_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, "trajectories")
        n_traj_files = len([f for f in os.listdir(traj_dir) if f.endswith(".jsonl")]) if os.path.isdir(traj_dir) else 0
        self._print(f"    Trajectories:   {traj_dir}/ ({n_traj_files} files, {self.total_trajectories} trajectories)")
        self._print(f"    Perf stats:     {os.path.join(output_dir, 'perf_stats.json')}")
        if config.save_model:
            self._print(f"    Model:          {os.path.join(output_dir, 'final_model/')}")
        self._print("=" * 60)

    def _print_reward_trend(self, records):
        rewards = [r.avg_reward for r in records]
        n = len(rewards)
        if n <= 2:
            self._print(f"    avg: {sum(rewards)/n:.3f} (min={min(rewards):.3f}, max={max(rewards):.3f})")
            return

        first_half = rewards[:n // 2]
        second_half = rewards[n // 2:]
        avg_first = sum(first_half) / len(first_half)
        avg_second = sum(second_half) / len(second_half)

        if abs(avg_second - avg_first) < 0.001:
            self._print(f"    Stable at {avg_second:.3f} across all steps")
        else:
            delta = avg_second - avg_first
            direction = "+" if delta > 0 else ""
            pct = (delta / avg_first * 100) if avg_first else 0
            self._print(f"    Step 1-{n//2}:     avg {avg_first:.3f}")
            self._print(f"    Step {n//2+1}-{n}:     avg {avg_second:.3f} ({direction}{pct:.1f}%)")

        self._print(f"    Final:          {rewards[-1]:.3f} (min={min(rewards):.3f}, max={max(rewards):.3f})")

    def _print_training_dynamics(self, trl_logs):
        losses = [float(l.get("loss", 0)) for l in trl_logs if "loss" in l]
        entropies = [float(l.get("entropy", 0)) for l in trl_logs if "entropy" in l]
        grad_norms = [float(l.get("grad_norm", 0)) for l in trl_logs if "grad_norm" in l]

        if losses:
            first, last = losses[0], losses[-1]
            if first > 0:
                change = (last - first) / first * 100
                self._print(f"    Loss:           {first:.4f} -> {last:.4f} ({change:+.1f}%)")
            else:
                self._print(f"    Loss:           {first:.4f} -> {last:.4f}")

        if entropies:
            self._print(f"    Entropy:        {entropies[0]:.4f} -> {entropies[-1]:.4f}")

        if grad_norms:
            avg_gn = sum(grad_norms) / len(grad_norms)
            self._print(f"    Grad norm:      avg {avg_gn:.4f} (min={min(grad_norms):.4f}, max={max(grad_norms):.4f})")

    def _print_perf_breakdown(self, s):
        tb = s["time_breakdown"]
        ts = s["token_stats"]
        wall = s["total_wall_time"]
        bar_width = 30

        items = [
            ("Rollout", tb["rollout_pct"]),
            ("  LLM", tb["llm_pct"]),
            ("  Env", tb["env_pct"]),
            ("  Logprob", tb["logprob_pct"]),
            ("Training", tb["training_pct"]),
        ]

        self._print(f"    Wall time:      {self._fmt_time(wall)}")
        for label, pct in items:
            filled = int(bar_width * pct / 100)
            bar = "\u2588" * filled + "\u2591" * (bar_width - filled)
            self._print(f"    {label:<12} {bar} {pct:>5.1f}%")

        self._print(f"    Throughput:     {ts['avg_tokens_per_second']} tok/s, avg {ts['avg_response_length']} tokens/response")

"""
Training logger with real-time progress table and post-training report.
"""

import os
import time
from dataclasses import dataclass, field


@dataclass
class StepRecord:
    step: int = 0
    num_trajectories: int = 0
    avg_reward: float = 0.0
    rollout_time: float = 0.0
    tokens_per_second: float = 0.0
    loss: float = 0.0
    entropy: float = 0.0
    grad_norm: float = 0.0
    lr: float = 0.0
    reward_from_fn: float = 0.0


class TrainingLogger:
    def __init__(self, verbose=True, log_file=None):
        self.verbose = verbose
        self.total_steps: int = 0
        self.num_epochs: int = 0
        self.total_trajectories: int = 0
        self.start_time: float = 0.0
        self._rollout_start: float = 0.0
        self._header_printed = False

        self.step_records: list[StepRecord] = []
        self._current: StepRecord | None = None
        self._trl_metrics: list[dict] = []

        self._log_file = None
        if log_file:
            os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(log_file), exist_ok=True)
            self._log_file = open(log_file, "w")

    def _print(self, text=""):
        print(text)
        if self._log_file:
            self._log_file.write(text + "\n")
            self._log_file.flush()

    def close(self):
        if self._log_file:
            self._log_file.close()
            self._log_file = None

    def _fmt_time(self, seconds):
        if seconds < 60:
            return f"{seconds:.1f}s"
        m, s = divmod(int(seconds), 60)
        if m < 60:
            return f"{m}m{s:02d}s"
        h, m = divmod(m, 60)
        return f"{h}h{m:02d}m{s:02d}s"

    # ── Setup phase ──────────────────────────────────────────

    def log_training_start(self, config):
        self.start_time = time.time()
        self._print(config.summary())
        self._print()

    def log_model_loaded(self, model_name, device, param_count=None):
        param_str = f", {param_count/1e6:.1f}M params" if param_count else ""
        self._print(f"  Model loaded: {model_name} ({device}{param_str})")

    def log_dataset_ready(self, size, sample=None):
        self._print(f"  Dataset ready: {size} problems")

    def log_trainer_ready(self, num_epochs):
        self.num_epochs = num_epochs
        self._print(f"  Trainer ready: {num_epochs} epoch(s)")
        self._print()

    # ── Progress table ───────────────────────────────────────

    def _print_header(self):
        if self._header_printed:
            return
        self._header_printed = True
        header = (
            f"{'Step':>6}  {'Trajs':>5}  {'Reward':>7}  "
            f"{'Loss':>8}  {'Entropy':>8}  {'GradNorm':>9}  "
            f"{'Rollout':>8}  {'tok/s':>7}  {'ETA':>8}"
        )
        self._print(header)
        self._print("─" * len(header))

    def _print_step_row(self, rec: StepRecord):
        elapsed = time.time() - self.start_time
        remaining_steps = self.total_steps - rec.step if self.total_steps > 0 else 0
        avg_step = elapsed / rec.step if rec.step else 0
        eta = self._fmt_time(remaining_steps * avg_step) if avg_step and remaining_steps > 0 else "—"

        tps_str = f"{rec.tokens_per_second:.1f}" if rec.tokens_per_second > 0 else "—"

        total_str = str(self.total_steps) if self.total_steps > 0 else "?"
        row = (
            f"{rec.step:>3}/{total_str:<3} "
            f"{rec.num_trajectories:>5}  "
            f"{rec.avg_reward:>7.3f}  "
            f"{self._fmt_time(rec.rollout_time):>8}  "
            f"{tps_str:>7}  "
            f"{eta:>8}"
        )
        self._print(row)

    # ── Called from rollout.py ────────────────────────────────

    def log_rollout_start(self, step, num_prompts, num_generations):
        self._rollout_start = time.time()
        self._current = StepRecord(step=step)
        self._print_header()
        total_str = str(self.total_steps) if self.total_steps > 0 else "?"
        self._print(f"    ··· step {step}/{total_str}: generating {num_generations} trajectories...")

    def log_rollout_done(self, step, num_trajectories, rewards=None, rollout_stats=None):
        elapsed = time.time() - self._rollout_start
        self.total_trajectories += num_trajectories

        rec = self._current or StepRecord(step=step)
        rec.num_trajectories = num_trajectories
        rec.rollout_time = elapsed
        if rewards:
            rec.avg_reward = sum(rewards) / len(rewards)
        if rollout_stats:
            rec.tokens_per_second = rollout_stats.tokens_per_second

        self._print_header()
        self._print_step_row(rec)
        self.step_records.append(rec)
        self._current = None

    # ── Called from RllmCallback.on_log ──────────────────────

    def log_trajectory_done(self, step, idx, total, reward):
        self._print(f"    ··· trajectory {idx}/{total} done (reward={reward:.3f})")

    def log_logprob_start(self, step):
        self._print(f"    ··· computing logprobs...")

    def log_training_update_start(self, step):
        self._print(f"    ··· training update...")

    def update_training_metrics(self, logs: dict):
        self._trl_metrics.append(logs)

    def set_perf_stats(self, rollout_stats):
        if not self.step_records or not rollout_stats:
            return
        for rec, rs in zip(self.step_records, rollout_stats):
            rec.tokens_per_second = rs.tokens_per_second

    # ── End of training ──────────────────────────────────────

    def log_training_done(self):
        pass

    def log_model_saved(self, path):
        self._print(f"  Model saved to {path}")

    # ── Training Report ──────────────────────────────────────

    def print_training_report(self, config, perf_summary, output_dir):
        elapsed = time.time() - self.start_time
        records = self.step_records
        trl = self._trl_metrics

        self._print()
        self._print("=" * 60)
        self._print("                    Training Report")
        self._print("=" * 60)

        self._print()
        self._print("  Training Overview")
        self._print(f"    Model:          {config.model_name}")
        self._print(f"    Dataset:        {config.num_problems} problems, {config.num_epochs} epoch(s)")
        self._print(f"    Total:          {len(records)} steps, {self.total_trajectories} trajectories, {self._fmt_time(elapsed)}")

        self._print()
        self._print("  Reward Trend")
        if records:
            self._print_reward_trend(records)

        self._print()
        self._print("  Training Dynamics")
        if trl:
            self._print_training_dynamics(trl)

        self._print()
        self._print("  Performance Breakdown")
        if perf_summary:
            self._print_perf_breakdown(perf_summary)

        self._print()
        self._print("  Output Files")
        traj_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, "trajectories")
        n_traj_files = len([f for f in os.listdir(traj_dir) if f.endswith(".jsonl")]) if os.path.isdir(traj_dir) else 0
        self._print(f"    Trajectories:   {traj_dir}/ ({n_traj_files} files, {self.total_trajectories} trajectories)")
        self._print(f"    Perf stats:     {os.path.join(output_dir, 'perf_stats.json')}")
        if config.save_model:
            self._print(f"    Model:          {os.path.join(output_dir, 'final_model/')}")
        self._print("=" * 60)

    def _print_reward_trend(self, records):
        rewards = [r.avg_reward for r in records]
        n = len(rewards)
        if n <= 2:
            self._print(f"    avg: {sum(rewards)/n:.3f} (min={min(rewards):.3f}, max={max(rewards):.3f})")
            return

        first_half = rewards[:n // 2]
        second_half = rewards[n // 2:]
        avg_first = sum(first_half) / len(first_half)
        avg_second = sum(second_half) / len(second_half)

        if abs(avg_second - avg_first) < 0.001:
            self._print(f"    Stable at {avg_second:.3f} across all steps")
        else:
            delta = avg_second - avg_first
            direction = "+" if delta > 0 else ""
            pct = (delta / avg_first * 100) if avg_first else 0
            self._print(f"    Step 1-{n//2}:     avg {avg_first:.3f}")
            self._print(f"    Step {n//2+1}-{n}:     avg {avg_second:.3f} ({direction}{pct:.1f}%)")

        self._print(f"    Final:          {rewards[-1]:.3f} (min={min(rewards):.3f}, max={max(rewards):.3f})")

    def _print_training_dynamics(self, trl_logs):
        losses = [float(l.get("loss", 0)) for l in trl_logs if "loss" in l]
        entropies = [float(l.get("entropy", 0)) for l in trl_logs if "entropy" in l]
        grad_norms = [float(l.get("grad_norm", 0)) for l in trl_logs if "grad_norm" in l]

        if losses:
            first, last = losses[0], losses[-1]
            if first > 0:
                change = (last - first) / first * 100
                self._print(f"    Loss:           {first:.4f} -> {last:.4f} ({change:+.1f}%)")
            else:
                self._print(f"    Loss:           {first:.4f} -> {last:.4f}")

        if entropies:
            self._print(f"    Entropy:        {entropies[0]:.4f} -> {entropies[-1]:.4f}")

        if grad_norms:
            avg_gn = sum(grad_norms) / len(grad_norms)
            self._print(f"    Grad norm:      avg {avg_gn:.4f} (min={min(grad_norms):.4f}, max={max(grad_norms):.4f})")

    def _print_perf_breakdown(self, s):
        tb = s["time_breakdown"]
        ts = s["token_stats"]
        wall = s["total_wall_time"]
        bar_width = 30

        items = [
            ("Rollout", tb["rollout_pct"]),
            ("  LLM", tb["llm_pct"]),
            ("  Env", tb["env_pct"]),
            ("  Logprob", tb["logprob_pct"]),
            ("Training", tb["training_pct"]),
        ]

        self._print(f"    Wall time:      {self._fmt_time(wall)}")
        for label, pct in items:
            filled = int(bar_width * pct / 100)
            bar = "\u2588" * filled + "\u2591" * (bar_width - filled)
            self._print(f"    {label:<12} {bar} {pct:>5.1f}%")

        self._print(f"    Throughput:     {ts['avg_tokens_per_second']} tok/s, avg {ts['avg_response_length']} tokens/response")

        h, m = divmod(m, 60)
        return f"{h}h{m:02d}m{s:02d}s"

    # ── Setup phase ──────────────────────────────────────────

    def log_training_start(self, config):

    def _print_step_row(self, rec: StepRecord):

        self._print(row)

    # ── Called from rollout.py ────────────────────────────────

    def log_rollout_start(self, step, num_prompts, num_generations):
        self._rollout_start = time.time()
        self._current = StepRecord(step=step)
        self._print_header()
        total_str = str(self.total_steps) if self.total_steps > 0 else "?"
        self._print(f"    ··· step {step}/{total_str}: generating {num_generations} trajectories...")

    def log_rollout_done(self, step, num_trajectories, rewards=None, rollout_stats=None):
        elapsed = time.time() - self._rollout_start
        self.total_trajectories += num_trajectories

        rec = self._current or StepRecord(step=step)
        rec.num_trajectories = num_trajectories
        rec.rollout_time = elapsed
        if rewards:
            rec.avg_reward = sum(rewards) / len(rewards)
        if rollout_stats:
            rec.tokens_per_second = rollout_stats.tokens_per_second

        self._print_header()
        self._print_step_row(rec)
        self.step_records.append(rec)
        self._current = None

    # ── Called from RllmCallback.on_log ──────────────────────

    def log_trajectory_done(self, step, idx, total, reward):
        self._print(f"    ··· trajectory {idx}/{total} done (reward={reward:.3f})")

    def log_logprob_start(self, step):
        self._print(f"    ··· computing logprobs...")

    def log_training_update_start(self, step):
        self._print(f"    ··· training update...")

    def update_training_metrics(self, logs: dict):
        self._trl_metrics.append(logs)

    def set_perf_stats(self, rollout_stats):
        if not self.step_records or not rollout_stats:
            return
        for rec, rs in zip(self.step_records, rollout_stats):
            rec.tokens_per_second = rs.tokens_per_second

    # ── End of training ──────────────────────────────────────

    def log_training_done(self):
        pass

    def log_model_saved(self, path):
        self._print(f"  Model saved to {path}")

    # ── Training Report ──────────────────────────────────────

    def print_training_report(self, config, perf_summary, output_dir):
        elapsed = time.time() - self.start_time
        records = self.step_records
        trl = self._trl_metrics

        self._print()
        self._print("=" * 60)
        self._print("                    Training Report")
        self._print("=" * 60)

        self._print()
        self._print("  Training Overview")
        self._print(f"    Model:          {config.model_name}")
        self._print(f"    Dataset:        {config.num_problems} problems, {config.num_epochs} epoch(s)")
        self._print(f"    Total:          {len(records)} steps, {self.total_trajectories} trajectories, {self._fmt_time(elapsed)}")

        self._print()
        self._print("  Reward Trend")
        if records:
            self._print_reward_trend(records)

        self._print()
        self._print("  Training Dynamics")
        if trl:
            self._print_training_dynamics(trl)

        self._print()
        self._print("  Performance Breakdown")
        if perf_summary:
            self._print_perf_breakdown(perf_summary)

        self._print()
        self._print("  Output Files")
        traj_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, "trajectories")
        n_traj_files = len([f for f in os.listdir(traj_dir) if f.endswith(".jsonl")]) if os.path.isdir(traj_dir) else 0
        self._print(f"    Trajectories:   {traj_dir}/ ({n_traj_files} files, {self.total_trajectories} trajectories)")
        self._print(f"    Perf stats:     {os.path.join(output_dir, 'perf_stats.json')}")
        if config.save_model:
            self._print(f"    Model:          {os.path.join(output_dir, 'final_model/')}")
        self._print("=" * 60)

    def _print_reward_trend(self, records):
        rewards = [r.avg_reward for r in records]
        n = len(rewards)
        if n <= 2:
            self._print(f"    avg: {sum(rewards)/n:.3f} (min={min(rewards):.3f}, max={max(rewards):.3f})")
            return

        first_half = rewards[:n // 2]
        second_half = rewards[n // 2:]
        avg_first = sum(first_half) / len(first_half)
        avg_second = sum(second_half) / len(second_half)

        if abs(avg_second - avg_first) < 0.001:
            self._print(f"    Stable at {avg_second:.3f} across all steps")
        else:
            delta = avg_second - avg_first
            direction = "+" if delta > 0 else ""
            pct = (delta / avg_first * 100) if avg_first else 0
            self._print(f"    Step 1-{n//2}:     avg {avg_first:.3f}")
            self._print(f"    Step {n//2+1}-{n}:     avg {avg_second:.3f} ({direction}{pct:.1f}%)")

        self._print(f"    Final:          {rewards[-1]:.3f} (min={min(rewards):.3f}, max={max(rewards):.3f})")

    def _print_training_dynamics(self, trl_logs):
        losses = [float(l.get("loss", 0)) for l in trl_logs if "loss" in l]
        entropies = [float(l.get("entropy", 0)) for l in trl_logs if "entropy" in l]
        grad_norms = [float(l.get("grad_norm", 0)) for l in trl_logs if "grad_norm" in l]

        if losses:
            first, last = losses[0], losses[-1]
            if first > 0:
                change = (last - first) / first * 100
                self._print(f"    Loss:           {first:.4f} -> {last:.4f} ({change:+.1f}%)")
            else:
                self._print(f"    Loss:           {first:.4f} -> {last:.4f}")

        if entropies:
            self._print(f"    Entropy:        {entropies[0]:.4f} -> {entropies[-1]:.4f}")

        if grad_norms:
            avg_gn = sum(grad_norms) / len(grad_norms)
            self._print(f"    Grad norm:      avg {avg_gn:.4f} (min={min(grad_norms):.4f}, max={max(grad_norms):.4f})")

    def _print_perf_breakdown(self, s):
        tb = s["time_breakdown"]
        ts = s["token_stats"]
        wall = s["total_wall_time"]
        bar_width = 30

        items = [
            ("Rollout", tb["rollout_pct"]),
            ("  LLM", tb["llm_pct"]),
            ("  Env", tb["env_pct"]),
            ("  Logprob", tb["logprob_pct"]),
            ("Training", tb["training_pct"]),
        ]

        self._print(f"    Wall time:      {self._fmt_time(wall)}")
        for label, pct in items:
            filled = int(bar_width * pct / 100)
            bar = "\u2588" * filled + "\u2591" * (bar_width - filled)
            self._print(f"    {label:<12} {bar} {pct:>5.1f}%")

        self._print(f"    Throughput:     {ts['avg_tokens_per_second']} tok/s, avg {ts['avg_response_length']} tokens/response")

lines: if not self.step_records or not rollout_stats:

tool_response.originalFile:
"""
Agent RL Demo: rllm + TRL integration on Mac Air

Usage:
    # Natural language:
    python -m rllm_train.train "用 qwen-0.5b 训练数学 agent，64 个问题，2 个 epoch"
    python -m rllm_train.train "quick test with 16 problems"

    # Default config:
    python -m rllm_train.train
"""

import os
import re
import sys
import warnings

os.environ["TRL_EXPERIMENTAL_SILENCE"] = "1"
os.environ["TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM"] = "false"
os.environ["HF_HUB_DISABLE_PROGRESS_BARS"] = "1"
os.environ["HF_HUB_DISABLE_IMPLICIT_TOKEN"] = "1"
os.environ["TRANSFORMERS_NO_ADVISORY_WARNINGS"] = "1"

warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message=".*pin_memory.*")
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message=".*torch_dtype.*is deprecated.*")
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message=".*attention mask is not set.*")
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message=".*unauthenticated requests.*")

import logging
logging.getLogger("huggingface_hub").setLevel(logging.ERROR)

import torch
from datasets import Dataset
import transformers
transformers.logging.set_verbosity_error()
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer, PrinterCallback
from peft import LoraConfig, TaskType
from trl.trainer.grpo_config import GRPOConfig
from trl.trainer.grpo_trainer import GRPOTrainer

from rllm_train.config import TrainingConfig, parse_natural_language
from rllm_train.logger import TrainingLogger
from rllm_train.math_env import generate_math_problems


def build_dataset(problems):
    records = []
    for p in problems:
        records.append({
            "prompt": [
                {"role": "system", "content": "Solve the math problem. Show your reasoning, then write the final numeric answer."},
                {"role": "user", "content": p["question"]},
            ],
            "answer": p["answer"],
        })
    return Dataset.from_list(records)


def load_deepscaler_dataset(config):
    from datasets import load_from_disk
    ds = load_from_disk(config.dataset_path)
    if config.num_problems < len(ds):
        ds = ds.shuffle(seed=config.seed).select(range(config.num_problems))
    records = []
    for item in ds:
        records.append({
            "prompt": [
                {"role": "system", "content": "Solve the math problem. Show your reasoning, then write the final numeric answer."},
                {"role": "user", "content": item["problem"]},
            ],
            "answer": item["answer"],
        })
    return Dataset.from_list(records)


def math_reward_fn(prompts, completions, **kwargs):
    rewards = []
    answers = kwargs.get("answer", [])
    for i, (prompt, completion) in enumerate(zip(prompts, completions)):
        gt = answers[i] if i < len(answers) else None
        if isinstance(completion, list):
            text = " ".join(
                msg.get("content", "") for msg in completion if isinstance(msg, dict)
            )
        else:
            text = str(completion)
        numbers = re.findall(r'-?\d+\.?\d*', text)
        if numbers and gt is not None:
            try:
                predicted = float(numbers[-1])
                expected = float(gt)
                rewards.append(1.0 if abs(predicted - expected) < 1e-6 else 0.0)
            except (ValueError, TypeError):
                rewards.append(0.0)
        else:
            rewards.append(0.0)
    return rewards


def eval_answer_to_float(answer_str):
    import math as _math
    answer_str = answer_str.strip()
    try:
        return float(answer_str)
    except ValueError:
        pass
    try:
        import sympy
        s = answer_str
        s = s.replace('\\frac{', '((').replace('}{', ')/(').replace('}', ')')
        s = s.replace('\\sqrt{', '_math.sqrt(')
        s = s.replace('\\pi', str(_math.pi))
        s = s.replace('^', '**')
        if s.count('(') > s.count(')'):
            s += ')' * (s.count('(') - s.count(')'))
        val = float(eval(s, {"__builtins__": {}}, {"_math": _math, "math": _math}))
        return val
    except Exception:
        pass
    try:
        import sympy
        expr = sympy.sympify(answer_str, evaluate=True)
        return float(expr.evalf())
    except Exception:
        return None


def deepscaler_reward_fn(prompts, completions, **kwargs):
    rewards = []
    answers = kwargs.get("answer", [])
    for i, (prompt, completion) in enumerate(zip(prompts, completions)):
        gt = answers[i] if i < len(answers) else None
        if isinstance(completion, list):
            text = " ".join(
                msg.get("content", "") for msg in completion if isinstance(msg, dict)
            )
        else:
            text = str(completion)
        numbers = re.findall(r'-?\d+\.?\d*', text)
        if not numbers or gt is None:
            rewards.append(0.0)
            continue
        predicted = float(numbers[-1])
        gt_val = eval_answer_to_float(str(gt))
        if gt_val is None:
            rewards.append(0.0)
        elif abs(predicted - gt_val) < max(1e-3, 1e-2 * abs(gt_val)):
            rewards.append(1.0)
        else:
            rel_err = abs(predicted - gt_val) / max(abs(gt_val), 1e-6)
            if rel_err < 0.1:
                rewards.append(0.5)
            elif rel_err < 0.5:
                rewards.append(0.2)
            else:
                rewards.append(0.0)
    return rewards


def main(config: TrainingConfig | None = None):
    if config is None:
        config = TrainingConfig()

    output_dir = config.output_dir
    os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)

    config.to_json(os.path.join(output_dir, "config.json"))

    log_file = os.path.join(output_dir, "training_log.txt")
    log = TrainingLogger(verbose=config.verbose, log_file=log_file)
    log.log_training_start(config)

    tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(config.model_name, trust_remote_code=True)
    if tokenizer.pad_token is None:
        tokenizer.pad_token = tokenizer.eos_token

    if torch.cuda.is_available():
        device = "cuda"
        dtype = torch.bfloat16
    elif torch.backends.mps.is_available():
        device = "mps"
        dtype = torch.float32
    else:
        device = "cpu"
        dtype = torch.float32

    model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(
        config.model_name, torch_dtype=dtype, trust_remote_code=True,
    )
    model.enable_input_require_grads()
    param_count = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())
    log.log_model_loaded(config.model_name, device, param_count)

    if config.dataset == "deepscaler" and config.dataset_path:
        dataset = load_deepscaler_dataset(config)
        reward_fn = deepscaler_reward_fn
    else:
        problems = generate_math_problems(n=config.num_problems, seed=config.seed, difficulty=config.difficulty)
        dataset = build_dataset(problems)
        reward_fn = math_reward_fn
    log.log_dataset_ready(len(dataset), dataset[0])

    training_args = GRPOConfig(
        output_dir=output_dir,
        num_train_epochs=config.num_epochs,
        per_device_train_batch_size=config.batch_size,
        num_generations=config.num_generations,
        max_completion_length=config.max_completion_length,
        learning_rate=config.learning_rate,
        logging_steps=config.logging_steps,
        logging_strategy="steps",
        log_level="info",
        save_strategy="no",
        bf16=(dtype == torch.bfloat16),
        fp16=False,
        gradient_accumulation_steps=config.gradient_accumulation_steps,
        gradient_checkpointing=getattr(config, 'gradient_checkpointing', False),
        report_to="none",
        remove_unused_columns=False,
        disable_tqdm=True,
        temperature=config.temperature,
        dataloader_num_workers=0,
    )

    log.log_trainer_ready(config.num_epochs)

    trainer = GRPOTrainer(
        model=model,
        args=training_args,
        processing_class=tokenizer,
        train_dataset=dataset,
        reward_funcs=[reward_fn],
        peft_config=LoraConfig(
            task_type=TaskType.CAUSAL_LM,
            r=16,
            lora_alpha=32,
            lora_dropout=0.05,
            target_modules=["q_proj", "k_proj", "v_proj", "o_proj", "gate_proj", "up_proj", "down_proj"],
        ),
    )

    trainer.train()

    log.print_training_report(config, None, output_dir)

    if config.save_model:
        save_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "final_model")
        model.save_pretrained(save_path)
        tokenizer.save_pretrained(save_path)
        log.log_model_saved(save_path)

    log.close()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    if len(sys.argv) > 1:
        arg = " ".join(sys.argv[1:])
        if arg.endswith(".json") and os.path.isfile(arg):
            cfg = TrainingConfig.from_json(arg)
        else:
            cfg = parse_natural_language(arg)
    else:
        cfg = TrainingConfig()
    main(cfg)

        logging_steps=config.logging_steps,

        log_level="info",
        save_strategy="no",
        bf16=(dtype == torch.bfloat16),
        fp16=False,
        gradient_accumulation_steps=config.gradient_accumulation_steps,
        gradient_checkpointing=getattr(config, 'gradient_checkpointing', False),
        report_to="none",
        remove_unused_columns=False,
        disable_tqdm=True,
        temperature=config.temperature,
        dataloader_num_workers=0,
    )

    log.log_trainer_ready(config.num_epochs)

    trainer = GRPOTrainer(
        model=model,
        args=training_args,
        processing_class=tokenizer,
        train_dataset=dataset,
        reward_funcs=[reward_fn],

tool_response.originalFile:
"""
Agent RL Demo: rllm + TRL integration on Mac Air

Usage:
    # Natural language:
    python -m rllm_train.train "用 qwen-0.5b 训练数学 agent，64 个问题，2 个 epoch"
    python -m rllm_train.train "quick test with 16 problems"

    # Default config:
    python -m rllm_train.train
"""

import os
import re
import sys
import warnings

os.environ["TRL_EXPERIMENTAL_SILENCE"] = "1"
os.environ["TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM"] = "false"
os.environ["HF_HUB_DISABLE_PROGRESS_BARS"] = "1"
os.environ["HF_HUB_DISABLE_IMPLICIT_TOKEN"] = "1"
os.environ["TRANSFORMERS_NO_ADVISORY_WARNINGS"] = "1"

warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message=".*pin_memory.*")
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message=".*torch_dtype.*is deprecated.*")
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message=".*attention mask is not set.*")
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message=".*unauthenticated requests.*")

import logging
logging.getLogger("huggingface_hub").setLevel(logging.ERROR)

import torch
from datasets import Dataset
import transformers
transformers.logging.set_verbosity_error()
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer, PrinterCallback
from peft import LoraConfig, TaskType
from trl.trainer.grpo_config import GRPOConfig
from trl.trainer.grpo_trainer import GRPOTrainer

from rllm_train.config import TrainingConfig, parse_natural_language
from rllm_train.logger import TrainingLogger
from rllm_train.math_env import generate_math_problems
from transformers import TrainerCallback


def build_dataset(problems):
    records = []
    for p in problems:
        records.append({
            "prompt": [
                {"role": "system", "content": "Solve the math problem. Show your reasoning, then write the final numeric answer."},
                {"role": "user", "content": p["question"]},
            ],
            "answer": p["answer"],
        })
    return Dataset.from_list(records)


def load_deepscaler_dataset(config):
    from datasets import load_from_disk
    ds = load_from_disk(config.dataset_path)
    if config.num_problems < len(ds):
        ds = ds.shuffle(seed=config.seed).select(range(config.num_problems))
    records = []
    for item in ds:
        records.append({
            "prompt": [
                {"role": "system", "content": "Solve the math problem. Show your reasoning, then write the final numeric answer."},
                {"role": "user", "content": item["problem"]},
            ],
            "answer": item["answer"],
        })
    return Dataset.from_list(records)


def math_reward_fn(prompts, completions, **kwargs):
    rewards = []
    answers = kwargs.get("answer", [])
    for i, (prompt, completion) in enumerate(zip(prompts, completions)):
        gt = answers[i] if i < len(answers) else None
        if isinstance(completion, list):
            text = " ".join(
                msg.get("content", "") for msg in completion if isinstance(msg, dict)
            )
        else:
            text = str(completion)
        numbers = re.findall(r'-?\d+\.?\d*', text)
        if numbers and gt is not None:
            try:
                predicted = float(numbers[-1])
                expected = float(gt)
                rewards.append(1.0 if abs(predicted - expected) < 1e-6 else 0.0)
            except (ValueError, TypeError):
                rewards.append(0.0)
        else:
            rewards.append(0.0)
    return rewards


def eval_answer_to_float(answer_str):
    import math as _math
    answer_str = answer_str.strip()
    try:
        return float(answer_str)
    except ValueError:
        pass
    try:
        import sympy
        s = answer_str
        s = s.replace('\\frac{', '((').replace('}{', ')/(').replace('}', ')')
        s = s.replace('\\sqrt{', '_math.sqrt(')
        s = s.replace('\\pi', str(_math.pi))
        s = s.replace('^', '**')
        if s.count('(') > s.count(')'):
            s += ')' * (s.count('(') - s.count(')'))
        val = float(eval(s, {"__builtins__": {}}, {"_math": _math, "math": _math}))
        return val
    except Exception:
        pass
    try:
        import sympy
        expr = sympy.sympify(answer_str, evaluate=True)
        return float(expr.evalf())
    except Exception:
        return None


def deepscaler_reward_fn(prompts, completions, **kwargs):
    rewards = []
    answers = kwargs.get("answer", [])
    for i, (prompt, completion) in enumerate(zip(prompts, completions)):
        gt = answers[i] if i < len(answers) else None
        if isinstance(completion, list):
            text = " ".join(
                msg.get("content", "") for msg in completion if isinstance(msg, dict)
            )
        else:
            text = str(completion)
        numbers = re.findall(r'-?\d+\.?\d*', text)
        if not numbers or gt is None:
            rewards.append(0.0)
            continue
        predicted = float(numbers[-1])
        gt_val = eval_answer_to_float(str(gt))
        if gt_val is None:
            rewards.append(0.0)
        elif abs(predicted - gt_val) < max(1e-3, 1e-2 * abs(gt_val)):
            rewards.append(1.0)
        else:
            rel_err = abs(predicted - gt_val) / max(abs(gt_val), 1e-6)
            if rel_err < 0.1:
                rewards.append(0.5)
            elif rel_err < 0.5:
                rewards.append(0.2)
            else:
                rewards.append(0.0)
    return rewards


def main(config: TrainingConfig | None = None):
    if config is None:
        config = TrainingConfig()

    output_dir = config.output_dir
    os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)

    config.to_json(os.path.join(output_dir, "config.json"))

    log_file = os.path.join(output_dir, "training_log.txt")
    log = TrainingLogger(verbose=config.verbose, log_file=log_file)
    log.log_training_start(config)

    class RllmCallback(TrainerCallback):
        def on_log(self, args, state, control, logs=None, **kwargs):
            if logs:
                log.update_training_metrics(logs)

    tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(config.model_name, trust_remote_code=True)
    if tokenizer.pad_token is None:
        tokenizer.pad_token = tokenizer.eos_token

    if torch.cuda.is_available():
        device = "cuda"
        dtype = torch.bfloat16
    elif torch.backends.mps.is_available():
        device = "mps"
        dtype = torch.float32
    else:
        device = "cpu"
        dtype = torch.float32

    model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(
        config.model_name, torch_dtype=dtype, trust_remote_code=True,
    )
    model.enable_input_require_grads()
    param_count = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())
    log.log_model_loaded(config.model_name, device, param_count)

    if config.dataset == "deepscaler" and config.dataset_path:
        dataset = load_deepscaler_dataset(config)
        reward_fn = deepscaler_reward_fn
    else:
        problems = generate_math_problems(n=config.num_problems, seed=config.seed, difficulty=config.difficulty)
        dataset = build_dataset(problems)
        reward_fn = math_reward_fn
    log.log_dataset_ready(len(dataset), dataset[0])

    training_args = GRPOConfig(
        output_dir=output_dir,
        num_train_epochs=config.num_epochs,
        per_device_train_batch_size=config.batch_size,
        num_generations=config.num_generations,
        max_completion_length=config.max_completion_length,
        learning_rate=config.learning_rate,
        logging_steps=config.logging_steps,
        logging_strategy="steps",
        log_level="info",
        save_strategy="no",
        bf16=(dtype == torch.bfloat16),
        fp16=False,
        gradient_accumulation_steps=config.gradient_accumulation_steps,
        gradient_checkpointing=getattr(config, 'gradient_checkpointing', False),
        report_to="none",
        remove_unused_columns=False,
        disable_tqdm=True,
        temperature=config.temperature,
        dataloader_num_workers=0,
    )

    log.log_trainer_ready(config.num_epochs)

    trainer = GRPOTrainer(
        model=model,
        args=training_args,
        processing_class=tokenizer,
        train_dataset=dataset,
        reward_funcs=[reward_fn],
        peft_config=LoraConfig(
            task_type=TaskType.CAUSAL_LM,
            r=16,
            lora_alpha=32,
            lora_dropout=0.05,
            target_modules=["q_proj", "k_proj", "v_proj", "o_proj", "gate_proj", "up_proj", "down_proj"],
        ),
    )

    trainer.train()

    log.print_training_report(config, None, output_dir)

    if config.save_model:
        save_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "final_model")
        model.save_pretrained(save_path)
        tokenizer.save_pretrained(save_path)
        log.log_model_saved(save_path)

    log.close()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    if len(sys.argv) > 1:
        arg = " ".join(sys.argv[1:])
        if arg.endswith(".json") and os.path.isfile(arg):
            cfg = TrainingConfig.from_json(arg)
        else:
            cfg = parse_natural_language(arg)
    else:
        cfg = TrainingConfig()
    main(cfg)

        config.model_name, torch_dtype=dtype, trust_remote_code=True,
